name: Cilantro-Chipotle Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients, except the mayonnaise, to the container of a blender.
2. Blend on low speed, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon until fully blended.
3. Add mayonnaise.
4. Blend on low speed, stirring occasionally until the mixture is smooth and creamy, about 3 minutes.
5. Serve immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve.
